Catalog should render a Card component
Catalog should display entity short name
Catalog should display dataset short name
Catalog should display data feed long name
Catalog should display Subscribed tag for active subscription
Catalog should display Pending tag for pending subscription
Catalog should display Expired tag for expired subscription
Catalog should display Request Access button for unknown subscription status
Catalog should display Request Access when no subscription
Catalog should show dash when entityShortName is empty
Catalog should show dash when datasetShortName is empty
Catalog should render for guest role with tooltip
Catalog should render Request Access button for inactive feed status
Catalog should apply opacity for inactive status
Catalog should have catalog-card className
Catalog should dispatch clearStore on mount
LoginForm should render a Form component
LoginForm should render form with name normal_login
LoginForm should render Form.Item components
LoginForm should render Input.Password for password field
LoginForm should render login button
LoginForm should render login button with text Log in
LoginForm should have login-form className
LoginForm should clear localStorage on render
LoginForm should render PSID placeholder for username
LoginForm should render Password placeholder
LoginForm should not show error alert initially
LoginForm should render button with primary type
LoginForm should render button with large size

Parent should render the component
Parent capture data
NewVendorHead should render header-one container
NewVendorHead should render Breadcrumb component
NewVendorHead should render Breadcrumb.Items
NewVendorHead should show Add entity when no id param
NewVendorHead should show Edit entity when id param exists
NewVendorHead should render Cancel button
NewVendorHead should render Submit button
NewVendorHead should disable Submit when activeSubmit is true
NewVendorHead should disable Submit when isSubmitted is true
NewVendorHead should render PageHeader
NewVendorHead should show Add Entity title when no id
NewVendorHead should show Edit Entity title when id exists
NewVendorHead should render Audit Log Modal
NewVendorHead should render Table inside Modal
NewVendorHead should call handleSubmitSuccess on Submit click
SplittingConfiguration should render a Form component
SplittingConfiguration should render Splitting Configuration header
SplittingConfiguration should render existing schema radio group
SplittingConfiguration should render Yes/No radio options for existing schema
SplittingConfiguration should render data format Select
SplittingConfiguration should render Upload components for schema data and metadata
SplittingConfiguration should render splitting path and source expression inputs
SplittingConfiguration should render with schemas from redux
SplittingConfiguration should render with existing schema config values
SplittingConfiguration should render with undefined schemaId
SplittingConfiguration should render with NA schemaId
SplittingConfiguration should render schema ID select as disabled when existing schema is No
SplittingConfiguration should set form name to br-one
SplittingConfiguration should render data format options (xml, json, xpath, csv)
SplittingConfiguration should render Form.Item components

wrapper
RequestModal should render a Modal component
RequestModal should pass visible prop from isModalVisible
RequestModal should render children content
RequestModal should render Cancel and Submit buttons in footer
RequestModal should show Approve button text for Approve Task title
RequestModal should show Reject button text for Reject Task title
RequestModal should show Delete button text for Delete title
RequestModal should render CheckCircleOutlined icon for Approve Task
RequestModal should render CloseCircleOutlined icon for Reject Task
RequestModal should render ExclamationCircleOutlined icon for Delete title
RequestModal should have primary type button for Approve Task
RequestModal should have default type button for Reject Task
RequestModal should set danger for non-Approve Task
RequestModal should not set danger for Approve Task
RequestModal should render modal as not visible when false
RequestModal should display title text in modal title

AddConfiguration component interactions renders step buttons and navigates steps
AddConfiguration component interactions renders Cancel button and triggers cancelHandler
AddConfiguration component interactions renders Previous button after first step
AddConfiguration component interactions disables Submit button when not on last step
AddConfiguration component interactions renders correct step titles
AddConfiguration component interactions renders Descriptions with correct labels

BreadcrumbComponent should render a Breadcrumb component
BreadcrumbComponent should render home icon link to /catalog
BreadcrumbComponent should render breadcrumb items from props
BreadcrumbComponent should render Link for items with url
BreadcrumbComponent should render text only for items without url
BreadcrumbComponent should handle empty breadcrumb array
BreadcrumbComponent should handle undefined breadcrumb
BreadcrumbComponent should render multiple breadcrumb items in order
BreadcrumbComponent should have truncate-text class on links

ErrorPage should display 404 status
ErrorPage should display 404 title
ErrorPage should display correct subtitle
ErrorPage should have an extra prop with a Button
ErrorPage should call history.replace with /catalog when button onClick is triggered

DatasetPageHeader should render PageHeader component
DatasetPageHeader should display datafeed long name
DatasetPageHeader should display dash when datafeedLongName is not provided
DatasetPageHeader should show Subscribed tag when subscription is active
DatasetPageHeader should not show Subscribed tag when subscription is not active
DatasetPageHeader should not show Subscribed tag when no subscription
DatasetPageHeader should have ghost false on PageHeader
DatasetPageHeader should have correct className

ApiConfiguration should render Form.Item components for request details and auth
ApiConfiguration should render Radio.Group for request method
ApiConfiguration should render GET and POST radio options
ApiConfiguration should render token requirement radio with Yes/No
ApiConfiguration should render Upload component
ApiConfiguration should render Divider
ApiConfiguration should render Request Details header
ApiConfiguration should render Authentication Details header
ApiConfiguration should not show username/tokenURL fields when tokenReq is No
ApiConfiguration should render with configValues from redux
ApiConfiguration should render with token requirement Yes from config

ApiConfiguration should render request parameter input
ApiConfiguration should call props.next when formData changes
ApiConfiguration should render with requestBodyObj in configValues

ApiConfiguration should have label-wrap className on Form

DatasetBreadcrumb should display title when provided

wrapper
MetadataTab should render Card component
MetadataTab should render with schema data
MetadataTab should render with empty schema string
MetadataTab should render with null metadata
MetadataTab should render with undefined metadata
ApproveRejectModal should render main container
ApproveRejectModal should render two RequestModal components
ApproveRejectModal should render Approve Task modal
ApproveRejectModal should render Reject Task modal
ApproveRejectModal should render Form inside reject modal
ApproveRejectModal should render reason TextArea in reject form
ApproveRejectModal should render Form.Item for reason
ApproveRejectModal should show approve modal text
ApproveRejectModal should show reject modal text
ApproveRejectModal should pass approve modal visibility
ApproveRejectModal should pass reject modal visibility
ApproveRejectModal should render with currentActionData
ApproveRejectModal should have reason field with max 250 chars
checkForString should return true when localStorage item contains the value
checkForString should return true for case-insensitive match
checkForString should return false when localStorage item does not contain value
checkForString should return falsy when localStorage item does not exist
checkForString should return true for partial match
TCGeneralSubscription should render the component
TCGeneralSubscription should render the header text
TCGeneralSubscription should render terms-conditions div when view is not rd
TCGeneralSubscription should not render terms-conditions div when view is rd
TCGeneralSubscription should show Accepted text when view is not tc
TCGeneralSubscription should not show Accepted text when view is tc
TCGeneralSubscription should show CheckCircleFilled icon when view is not tc
TCGeneralSubscription should render multiple h4 headings for sections
TCGeneralSubscription should render General heading
TCGeneralSubscription should render Licence and Restrictions heading
TCGeneralSubscription should render Usage heading
TCGeneralSubscription should render Storage heading
TCGeneralSubscription should render paragraph elements with terms text
TCVendorRequestSubscription should render the component
TCVendorRequestSubscription should render the header text
TCVendorRequestSubscription should render terms-conditions div when view is not rd
TCVendorRequestSubscription should not render terms-conditions div when view is rd
TCVendorRequestSubscription should show Accepted text when view is not tc
TCVendorRequestSubscription should not show Accepted text when view is tc
TCVendorRequestSubscription should show CheckCircleFilled icon when view is not tc
TCVendorRequestSubscription should apply opacity 0.5 when subForFlag true and dfVendor is Y
TCVendorRequestSubscription should apply opacity 0.5 when subForFlag false and vendorRequest not Y
TCVendorRequestSubscription should apply opacity none when subForFlag true and dfVendor not Y
TCVendorRequestSubscription should apply opacity none when subForFlag false and vendorRequest is Y
TCVendorRequestSubscription should render Governance heading
TCApplicationSubscription should render the component
TCApplicationSubscription should render the header text
TCApplicationSubscription should render terms-conditions div when view is not rd
TCApplicationSubscription should not render terms-conditions div when view is rd
TCApplicationSubscription should show Accepted text when view is not tc
TCApplicationSubscription should not show Accepted text when view is tc
TCApplicationSubscription should show CheckCircleFilled icon when view is not tc
TCApplicationSubscription should apply opacity 0.5 when subForFlag is true
TCApplicationSubscription should apply opacity none when subForFlag is false
TCApplicationSubscription should render Operational Level Agreement heading
TCApplicationSubscription should apply opacity to terms section when subForFlag true and vendorRequest not Y
TCApplicationSubscription should not apply opacity to terms section when vendorRequest is Y
GeneralConfiguration should render a Form component
GeneralConfiguration should render Select with source processor options
GeneralConfiguration should render Main Configuration header
GeneralConfiguration should render Proxy header
GeneralConfiguration should render On-Demand Vendor request header
GeneralConfiguration should render DatePicker components for start and expiry dates
GeneralConfiguration should render Radio.Group components
GeneralConfiguration should render multiple Dividers
GeneralConfiguration should not show proxy fields by default (proxyRequirement = No)
GeneralConfiguration should render with config values from redux
GeneralConfiguration should render with scheduled route type from config
GeneralConfiguration should disable fields when isUpdate prop is true
GeneralConfiguration should set form name to br-one
GeneralConfiguration should have source protocol radio buttons
GeneralConfiguration should render Form.Item components for all required fields
GeneralConfiguration should render keyLocation input
GeneralConfiguration should render cronScheduler input
ReviewSubmit should render a Form component
ReviewSubmit should render Main Configuration header
ReviewSubmit should render Proxy section header
ReviewSubmit should render On-Demand Vendor request header
ReviewSubmit should render Dividers between sections
ReviewSubmit should render with proxy requirement Yes
ReviewSubmit should render with splitting requirement Yes
ReviewSubmit should not render Splitting Configuration when splittingRequirement is No
ReviewSubmit should render with HTTPS source protocol for API config
ReviewSubmit should show Authentication Details when HTTPS and tokenReq Yes
ReviewSubmit should render with vendorRequestConfig Y
ReviewSubmit should render with vendorRequestConfig N
ReviewSubmit should render with histLoad Yes for historic load section
ReviewSubmit should render data format text for JSON type
ReviewSubmit should render data format text for xpath type
ReviewSubmit should render data format text for csv type
ReviewSubmit should render with routeType as ScheduledRoute class
ReviewSubmit should render with routeType as One-time
ReviewSubmit should display boolean values as True/False text
ReviewSubmit should render review-submit wrapper div
ReviewSubmit should render with Data Operations role showing warning
isNumber should return true for digit key (0-9)
isNumber should return false for alphabetic key
isNumber should return true for control keys (charCode <= 31)
isNumber should return false for special character keys
isNumber should use keyCode when which is not available
isNumber should use window.event when evt is falsy
ReviewSubmit (Vendor) should render main container
ReviewSubmit (Vendor) should render Row component
ReviewSubmit (Vendor) should render Col for each data field
ReviewSubmit (Vendor) should give entityDescription col span 16
ReviewSubmit (Vendor) should give non-description cols span 8
ReviewSubmit (Vendor) should display dash for empty values
ReviewSubmit (Vendor) should render website as a link
ReviewSubmit (Vendor) should display label-review spans
Contract bindData should not call setFieldsValue when data is null
Contract bindData should not call setFieldsValue when data is empty array
Contract bindData should call setFieldsValue for regular fields
Contract bindData should convert signedOn to moment date
Contract bindData should convert startDate to moment date
Contract bindData should convert expirationDate to moment date
Contract bindData should handle multiple fields in one data item
Contract bindData should filter out undefined elements from data array
getHardCodedRole should return Owner role for owner PSIDs
getHardCodedRole should return Consumer role for consumer PSIDs
getHardCodedRole should return Admin role for admin PSIDs
getHardCodedRole should return null for unknown PSIDs
getHardCodedRole should handle numeric PSID input by converting to string
setLocalStorage should set all local storage items
setLocalStorage should overwrite existing local storage items
createNewUserProfile should create a user profile object with correct fields
createNewUserProfile should set lastLogin and firstLogin to current date/time
ErrorAlert should render an Alert component
ErrorAlert should display the error message
ErrorAlert should have type error
ErrorAlert should show icon
ErrorAlert should handle empty message
ErrorAlert should handle long error message
ErrorAlert should handle special characters in message
ErrorAlert should handle undefined message
ErrorAlert should render without crashing when no props
HeaderPanel should render Descriptions component
HeaderPanel should render 5 Description.Items
HeaderPanel should display entity short name as data source
HeaderPanel should display NA when entityShortName is empty
HeaderPanel should display success badge for active status
HeaderPanel should display warning badge for pending status
HeaderPanel should display error badge for inactive status
HeaderPanel should display Unlimited licenses for enterprise license type
HeaderPanel should calculate available licenses for non-enterprise type
HeaderPanel should display license expiry date when inheritance flag is true
HeaderPanel should display agreement expiry date when inheritance flag is false
HeaderPanel should display default date 31 Dec 2099 when no agreement expiry
HeaderPanel should display NA for SCB Data Owner when not set
HeaderPanel should display SCB Data Owner when set
HeaderPanel should handle null licenseInfo gracefully
HeaderPanel should handle null used licenses
isAccesPageDisabled should return true (disabled) when objectMatrix is empty
isAccesPageDisabled should return true (disabled) when objectMatrix is not set
isAccesPageDisabled should return false (enabled) for Main Page with RW permission
isAccesPageDisabled should return false (enabled) for Main Page with R permission
isAccesPageDisabled should return true (disabled) for non-Main Page objName
isAccesPageDisabled should return true when no matching entry found
isAccesPageDisabled should match category case-insensitively but objectName exactly
isAccesPageDisabled should return true for Main Page with unknown permission
RequestAccess bindData should not call setFieldsValue when data is empty
RequestAccess bindData should map reason field to reasonForSubscription
RequestAccess bindData should map licensesSubscribed to numberOfEndUserSubscriptions
RequestAccess bindData should map subscriptionStatus to status
RequestAccess bindData should also set the original field value
RequestAccess bindData should handle multiple items in data array
isUnsubscribeDisabled should return true when user is dataset owner
isUnsubscribeDisabled should return true when user is read only
isUnsubscribeDisabled should return false when user is admin
isUnsubscribeDisabled should return false when user is consumer
isUnsubscribeDisabled should return false when entitlementType is not set
isButtonObject should return true (disabled) when objectMatrix is empty
isButtonObject should return true (disabled) when objectMatrix is not set
isButtonObject should return true for Main Page with RW permission
isButtonObject should return false for Main Page with R permission
isButtonObject should return false for non-Main Page with RW permission
isButtonObject should return true for non-Main Page with R permission
isButtonObject should return true when no matching entry found
isButtonObject should match case-insensitively
Contract modify should modify existing property error and message
Contract modify should return undefined when property does not exist
Contract modify should return a new object reference
Contract clarityIdValidation should return error when value is empty string
Contract clarityIdValidation should return error when value length is greater than 8
Contract clarityIdValidation should clear error when value is valid
Contract clarityIdValidation should accept value of exactly 8 characters
License bindData should call resetFields when data is empty
License bindData should call resetFields when data is null
License bindData should call setFieldsValue for regular fields
License bindData should convert boolean-like string fields to lowercase
License bindData should convert expirationDate to moment
License bindData should handle multiple known boolean fields
License bindData should not convert non-string boolean fields
isUserManagementDisabled should return false when objectMatrix is empty
isUserManagementDisabled should return true when Main Page is not disabled but Edit Button is disabled
isUserManagementDisabled should return false when Main Page is disabled and Edit Button is not disabled
UnsubscribeModal confirm should call Modal.confirm when invoked
UnsubscribeModal confirm should pass correct title
UnsubscribeModal confirm should pass correct okText
UnsubscribeModal confirm should pass correct cancelText
UnsubscribeModal confirm should set ok button as primary danger
UnsubscribeModal confirm should call unsubscribeHandler on OK
UnsubscribeModal confirm should not throw on cancel
getPermissionObject should return undefined when objectMatrix is empty
getPermissionObject should return undefined when objectMatrix is not set
getPermissionObject should return matching object when category and objectName match
getPermissionObject should match case-insensitively
getPermissionObject should return undefined when no match is found
getPermissionObject should handle items with null category or objectName
getPermissionObject should return the first matching object when multiple matches exist
wrapper
wrapper
modify should modify existing property error and message
modify should return undefined when property does not exist
modify should return a new object reference
clarityIdValidation should set error when idExist is true
clarityIdValidation should clear error when idExist is false
itamIdValidation should set error when idExist is true
itamIdValidation should clear error when idExist is false
mandatoryFields should enable all when both clarityId and itamId have values
mandatoryFields should enable only itamId related when only itamId has value
mandatoryFields should enable only clarityId related when only clarityId has value
mandatoryFields should return defaults when both are empty
mandatoryFields should return defaults when both are undefined
camelize should convert space-separated text to camelCase
camelize should convert dash-separated text to camelCase
camelize should convert underscore-separated text to camelCase
camelize should convert dot-separated text to camelCase
camelize should handle single word
camelize should handle multiple separators
normalText should add space before uppercase letters and capitalize first letter
normalText should handle single word
normalText should handle already capitalized text
normalLabel should convert camelCase to normal label
normalLabel should handle single word
normalLabel should convert helloWorld to Hello world
camelText should capitalize first letter and lowercase rest
camelText should handle already formatted text
camelText should handle single character
camelText should handle null/undefined
checkUrlSlash should replace forward slash with %2F
checkUrlSlash should return original string when no slashes
checkUrlSlash should return undefined for 're' (case-insensitive)
checkUrlSlash should handle null/undefined
getCustomLabels should replace 'id' with 'ID' in labels
getCustomLabels should return normal label for regular text
getObjFromSubscription should return value from business requirements
getObjFromSubscription should return undefined when subscription is null
getObjFromSubscription should return undefined when businessRequirements is empty
getObjFromSubscription should return undefined when businessRequirements is missing
getObjFromSubscription should return undefined for non-existent key
isSubscribersTabVisible should return true when user is IAM Admin
isSubscribersTabVisible should return false when user is Admin
isSubscribersTabVisible should return false when user is Consumer
isSubscribersTabVisible should return false when entitlementType is not set
isSubscribersTabVisible should match case-insensitively for IAM Admin
Constants should export HTTP methods
Constants should export content type
Constants should export role constants
Constants should export OWNER_ROLES as an array
Constants should export CONSUMER_ROLES as an array
Constants should export ADMIN_ROLES as an array
Constants should export local storage key constants
Constants should export page constants
ProtectedRoute should render a Route component
ProtectedRoute should pass path prop to Route
ProtectedRoute should render component when guestRole is set
ProtectedRoute should render component when code is set in localStorage
ProtectedRoute should render component when isAuthenticated returns true
ProtectedRoute should redirect to / when not authenticated
ProtectedRoute should pass extra props to the component
isAcessMasterDataDisabled should return false when user is dataset delegate
isAcessMasterDataDisabled should return false when user is read only
isAcessMasterDataDisabled should return false when user is dataset owner
isAcessMasterDataDisabled should return true when user is admin
isAcessMasterDataDisabled should return true when user is consumer
isAcessMasterDataDisabled should return true when entitlementType is not set
getUniqueFileName should return timestamp with filename when fileObj has name
getUniqueFileName should return timestamp with .pdf extension when fileObj has no name
getUniqueFileName should return timestamp with .pdf extension when fileObj is null
getUniqueFileName should return timestamp with .pdf extension when fileObj is undefined
getUniqueFileName should generate unique filenames for different calls
getUniqueFileName should handle filenames with special characters
isCatelogueAccessDisabled should return true when user is dataset delegate
isCatelogueAccessDisabled should return true when user is dataset owner
isCatelogueAccessDisabled should return true when user is read only
isCatelogueAccessDisabled should return false when user is admin
isCatelogueAccessDisabled should return false when user is consumer
isCatelogueAccessDisabled should return false when entitlementType is not set
loginValidation should return error when both username and password are empty
loginValidation should return error when both username and password are undefined
loginValidation should return error when username is missing but password provided
loginValidation should return error when username is undefined but password provided
loginValidation should return error when password is missing but username provided
loginValidation should return error when password is undefined but username provided
loginValidation should return error for username with invalid characters
loginValidation should accept username with allowed special characters (@./#&+-_)
loginValidation should accept numeric username
loginValidation should accept alphanumeric username
loginValidation should accept username with underscores
loginValidation should accept username with spaces
loginValidation should return no error for valid input
serverValidation should return error when value is defined with message
serverValidation should return no error when value is undefined
serverValidation should return error with custom message
serverValidation should return error with empty message
useAccessRights Read only role should return r: true for myTasks page
useAccessRights Read only role should return r: true for userManagement page
useAccessRights Read only role should return r: false for catalogue page
useAccessRights Read only role should not have none permission for any page
useAccessRights Dataset delegate role should return r: true for userManagement page
useAccessRights Dataset delegate role should return r: false for myTasks page
useAccessRights Subscriber role should return none: true for myTasks page
useAccessRights Subscriber role should return none: true for userManagement page
useAccessRights Subscriber role should return none: false for catalogue page
useAccessRights Guest role should return r: true for catalogue page
useAccessRights Guest role should return r: true for datafeedDetails page
useAccessRights Guest role should return none: true for requestAccess page
useAccessRights Guest role should return none: true for myTasks page
useAccessRights Guest role should return none: true for userManagement page
useAccessRights Guest role should return r: false for a non-restricted page
useAccessRights Role not in access rights list should return empty permissions for unknown role
useAccessRights Fallback to guestRole should use guestRole when entitlementType is not set
